name: uderia-browser
description: Headless browser automation via Playwright. Provides navigate, click, fill_form, screenshot, scrape, and extract_data tools.

ALLOWED_DOMAINS.label: Allowed domains
ALLOWED_DOMAINS.description: Comma-separated domain allowlist (e.g. example.com,docs.company.com). Leave empty to allow all.

HEADLESS.label: Headless mode
HEADLESS.description: Run browser in headless mode (recommended for server deployments).

PAGE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.label: Page timeout (seconds)
PAGE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.description: Maximum time to wait for page load.
